keyResults.title: Delivery Predictability & Agile Maturity
keyResults.description: Achieve a high completed-vs-committed delivery ratio and ensure sprint tickets meet the Definition of Done (DoD) across all Retail & Wholesale delivery squads.

keyResults.title: Testing Automation & Quality
keyResults.description: Increase automated test and regression coverage across apps in Retail Commerce, Retail Digital workspace, across desktop and mobile form factors.

keyResults.title: AI-Assisted Productivity
keyResults.description: Increase the percentage of product delivery work supported by AI-assisted tooling across Retail & Wholesale Technology — measured across four output types: requirements & user stories, data mapping artifacts, delivery scoping cycle time, and active use of a Retail & Wholesale domain knowledge base.
metrics: Requirements & user stories — % of sprint stories with AI-assisted first draft
Data mapping artifacts — % of integration and data mapping docs AI-generated as first draft
Delivery scoping — % of initiatives scoped within 1 sprint using AI-assisted analysis
Domain knowledge base — Retail & Wholesale knowledge base built, maintained, and actively referenced by squads

tiers.solid: 20% combined AI-assisted contributions across the four output types, measured quarterly from Q2 2026.
tiers.impressive: 30% combined AI-assisted contributions; Retail & Wholesale knowledge base v1.0 active and referenced by ≥2 squads.
tiers.excellent: 40% combined AI-assisted contributions; Retail & Wholesale knowledge base v1.0 active and referenced by ≥2 squads.

keyResults.title: Platform Services Adoption
keyResults.description: Drive global platform scale by building any new Retail & Wholesale capabilities via adoption of the approved and available Omnichannel Platform (OCP) services and ensuring all new initiatives requiring services assist funding and building out of OCP domains.

tiers.solid: 90% of new integrations built on new platform services where available.
tiers.impressive: Solid + One extra unfunded capabilities migrate to new OCP services from legacy services.
tiers.excellent: Solid + two extra unfunded capabilities migrate to new OCP services from legacy services.

keyResults.title: System Reliability & Security
keyResults.description: Maintain critical platform uptime across POS, Workforce Management, and Wholesale Order platforms and ensure rapid remediation of critical vulnerabilities detected.

tiers.solid: 99.0% uptime; critical vulnerabilities addressed in 3 days.
tiers.impressive: 99.5% uptime; critical vulnerabilities addressed in 48 hours.
tiers.excellent: 99.9% uptime; critical vulnerabilities addressed in 24 hours.

keyResults.title: Financial & Roadmap Rigor
keyResults.description: Deliver the Retail & Wholesale tech roadmaps on budget and sustain platforms within baseline opex budget.

keyResults.title: Team Health, Retention & Development
keyResults.description: Foster a high-performing organization by executing active development, and maintaining Peakon engagement scores from Q4 2025 benchmark.

tiers.solid: 90% retention; 90% of team has active development plans, Peakon score maintained.
tiers.impressive: 95% retention; 95% of team has active development plans, Peakon score improved by 0.1 for 1 quarter.
tiers.excellent: >95% retention; 100% development plans + >0.1 increase in Peakon focus areas maintained from Q1 to Q4.

keyResults.title: Planning & Delivery Framework Completion
keyResults.description: 100% completion of Planning and Delivery Framework artifacts for prioritized projects greater than USD $250k.

tiers.solid: 100% of prioritized projects (>$250k) have Planning & Delivery Framework artifacts completed on time.
tiers.impressive: Solid + artifacts completed ahead of schedule and signed off by stakeholders before project kick-off.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + framework adoption extends beyond the $250k threshold, with smaller initiatives voluntarily adopting artifacts — indicating cultural embedding across the team.

keyResults.title: Succession Readiness
keyResults.description: Ensure every critical role within the Retail & Wholesale Technology team has an identified and documented successor, with a development plan in place to close readiness gaps.

tiers.solid: 100% of critical roles have a named successor documented with an initial readiness assessment completed.
tiers.impressive: Solid + each successor has an active development plan targeting their specific readiness gaps, reviewed with the individual.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + at least one successor per critical role has been given a visible stretch assignment or acting opportunity to validate readiness in practice.

keyResults.title: Scheduling & Forecasting Capabilities
keyResults.description: Deliver scheduling and key forecasting capabilities that are fully deployed, adopted, and operational across target locations by October 2026.

tiers.solid: Capabilities are deployment-ready and validated in a staging environment by October 2026.
tiers.impressive: Solid + deployed and live in all target locations by October 2026, with initial user adoption confirmed.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + measurable operational impact demonstrated (e.g. reduction in manual scheduling effort or improvement in forecast accuracy) within the year.

keyResults.title: Quarterly Roadmap Delivery
keyResults.description: ≥90% of committed quarterly roadmap initiatives delivered within approved scope and timeline.

tiers.solid: ≥90% of committed quarterly roadmap initiatives delivered within approved scope and timeline.
tiers.impressive: ≥95% delivered on scope and timeline, with no scope reductions accepted post-commitment.
tiers.excellent: 100% delivered on scope and timeline; retrospective evidence showing improved estimation accuracy quarter-over-quarter.

tiers.solid: 100% of planned location deployments activated on time.
tiers.impressive: Solid + all deployments completed with zero critical post-go-live incidents within the first 30 days.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + deployment playbook refined and reused, reducing average deployment cycle time by ≥20% vs. baseline.

keyResults.title: Product Dashboard
keyResults.description: Build and embed a product dashboard that gives the Retail & Wholesale Technology team visibility into capability performance, enabling data-driven prioritisation and investment decisions.

tiers.solid: Product dashboard live with core metrics defined and accessible to the team by Q2 2026.
tiers.impressive: Solid + dashboard actively referenced in quarterly business reviews with at least one documented decision influenced by the data.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + dashboard expanded to include predictive or trending metrics, and adopted as the primary tool for roadmap prioritisation discussions.

keyResults.title: Innovation
keyResults.description: Foster a culture of innovation within Retail & Wholesale Technology by creating space for new ideas, experimentation, and calculated risk-taking.

tiers.solid: At least one structured innovation initiative (e.g. hackathon, spike, or experimentation sprint) run within the year, with outcomes shared across the team.
tiers.impressive: Solid + at least one idea originating from the team moves into the roadmap or is adopted as a practice change.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + innovation contributions recognised at a leadership level; team members proactively bring forward ideas without prompting.

keyResults.title: Communication
keyResults.description: Maintain clear, consistent, and transparent communication across the team and with senior stakeholders — ensuring alignment on priorities, progress, and decisions.

tiers.solid: Regular cadence of team and stakeholder communications maintained (e.g. team updates, leadership reporting) with no significant alignment gaps.
tiers.impressive: Solid + feedback from team and stakeholders reflects high clarity and confidence in direction; no surprises at key milestones.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + communication style recognised as a model within the broader leadership group; proactively shapes narratives rather than responding to them.

keyResults.title: Vision & Strategy
keyResults.description: Articulate and sustain a clear multi-year technology vision for Retail & Wholesale that connects team work to Arc'teryx's broader strategic direction.

tiers.solid: A documented Retail & Wholesale Technology vision and 2026 strategy communicated to the team and referenced in planning.
tiers.impressive: Solid + vision actively used to prioritise and deprioritise work; team can articulate how their work connects to the broader strategy.
tiers.excellent: Impressive + vision recognised and cited by senior leadership as a benchmark for strategic clarity within the technology organisation.
